activities_projects.title: Distributive Law Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Explore the distributive property of multiplication over addition
steps: Verify the result by calculating both sides

activities_projects.title: Algebra Expansion Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Apply distributive property to algebraic expressions
steps: Multiply each term inside the bracket

activities_projects.title: Factorisation Puzzle
steps: Rewrite the expression in factorised form

activities_projects.title: Bracket Simplification Race
steps: Expand and simplify step by step
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops skills in simplifying algebraic expressions

activities_projects.title: Two-Step Distribution
activities_projects.objective: Solve expressions requiring multiple distributive steps
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies distributive property and combines like terms

activities_projects.title: Distribution Comparison Activity
activities_projects.objective: Compare results of distributed and non-distributed expressions

activities_projects.title: Expression Creation Challenge
activities_projects.objective: Create algebraic expressions using distributive property

activities_projects.title: Word Problem Distribution
activities_projects.objective: Apply distributive property to solve word problems
steps: Create a word problem involving repeated groups
Translate it into a mathematical expression
activities_projects.evaluation: Logical reasoning and correct answer (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Missing Value Expression
activities_projects.objective: Find unknown values in algebraic expressions

activities_projects.title: Distribution Poster Project
steps: Show examples with diagrams or algebra
